sources.cleaned_content:
Premium Backing Plate

Premium Backing Plate for polishing machines

The Menzerna Premium Backing Plate is a flexible, high-quality plate with a powerful hook-and-loop underside. It supports safe and comfortable working on corners, edges, and contours. Suitable for all standard polishing machines. The polishing plate is available in three different sizes to match the Menzerna polishing pads.

Category: Accessories

Processing: Rotary

Volumes:
75mm / 3" - 26934.099.001 (EU Thread)
75mm / 3" - 26934.099.133 (US Thread)
123mm / 5" - 26931.099.001 (EU Thread)
123mm / 5" - 26931.099.133 (US Thread)
148mm / 6" - 26935.099.001 (EU Thread)
148mm / 6" - 26935.099.133 (US Thread)

Optimised for:
- Polishing Adapter for Drilling Machines
- Orbital Wool Pad
- Heavy Cut Foam Pad
- Medium Cut Foam Pad

Downloads:
Technical datasheet Premium Backing Plate (124.37 KB): https://www.menzerna.com/fileadmin/ns_theme_menzerna/Dokumente/Technische_Datenblaetter/Zubehoer/EN/TDB_1_BackingPlate_EN_09.2021.pdf

FAQ - Questions & answers:

Q: How do I choose the right backing plate?
A: Backing plates are used with rotary polishing machines. Menzerna offers backing plates in three sizes, depending on the size of the polishing pad. It's important to remember that the polishing pad should always be bigger than the backing plate.

Q: What kinds of polishing machine are there?
A: There are rotary and orbital polishing machines. Orbital polishing machines are divided into fixed and random models.

Q: What's the difference between an orbital and a rotary polishing machine?
A: The backing plate of a rotary polishing machine turns in a circle around a fixed point. Rotary machines are ideal for removing deeper cracks in the paint. The backing plate of the orbital polishing machine produces orbital movements, making the orbital machine suitable for single-stage polishing processes, in particular.

Q: What's the difference between a normal and a fixed orbital polishing machine?
A: There are two types of orbital polishing machine: random and fixed. The backing plate of a random orbital polishing machine can be turned, while that of a fixed machine cannot.

Backing Plate in long-lasting Menzerna quality. Perfectly tailored to Menzerna polishing pads and polishes. This professional polishing plate is available in the gauges M14 (EU) and 5/8" (US), as well as in a range of sizes.
